rationale: Educ. Code §12.020 governs charter amendment procedures for home-rule school districts. It has no operative relationship to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: The governing body of a home-rule school district on its own motion may submit a proposed charter amendment that complies with this subchapter to the commissioner for legal review.
_note: Rule text concerns school district charter amendment process; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
